turns.query: Help me assess the pollution dispersion from Qian'an Jiujiang Wire Rod Co., Ltd. (company_id: 2426) on 2025-06-10 during the morning production peak (06:00-10:00).
turns.actual_response:
公司在2025年6月10日06:00-10:00期间的污染排放情况如下：

- 总烟气量（total_flue_gas）：118,454,696.0 立方米
- 峰值烟气量（peak_flue_gas）：30,326,000.0 立方米
- 总NOx排放量（total_nox）：465.34003 千克
- 周围10公里内的空气质量站点数量（stations_within_10km）：12

这些数据可以帮助评估公司在该时间段内的污染传输情况。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 获取公司2426在2025-06-10 06:00-10:00的排放数据
query_emission = text("""
SELECT 
    SUM(exhaust_gas) AS total_exhaust_gas, 
    MAX(exhaust_gas) AS peak_exhaust_gas, 
    SUM(nox) AS total_nox 
FROM 
    hourly_polluting_company_emission 
WHERE 
    company_id = 2426 AND 
    timestamp >= '2025-06-10 06:00:00' AND 
    timestamp < '2025-06-10 10:00:00'
""")

emission_data = pd.read_sql(query_emission, engine)
print(emission_data)

# 获取公司2426的坐标
query_company_location = text("""
SELECT 
    coordinate 
FROM 
    polluting_company 
WHERE 
    id = 2426
""")

company_location = pd.read_sql(query_company_location, engine)
company_longitude, company_latitude = company_location.iloc[0]['coordinate'].coords[0]

# 获取公司2426周围10公里内的空气质量站点数量
query_stations_within_10km = text(f"""
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) 
FROM 
    air_quality_station 
WHERE 
    ST_DWithin(coordinate, ST_GeomFromText('POINT({company_longitude} {company_latitude})', 4326), 10000)
""")

stations_within_10km = pd.read_sql(query_stations_within_10km, engine)
print(stations_within_10km)

# 将结果赋值给变量
total_flue_gas = emission_data.iloc[0]['total_exhaust_gas']
peak_flue_gas = emission_data.iloc[0]['peak_exhaust_gas']
total_nox = emission_data.iloc[0]['total_nox']
stations_within_10km = stations_within_10km.iloc[0][0]

# 修正公司坐标获取方式
query_company_location = text("""
SELECT 
    ST_X(coordinate) AS longitude, 
    ST_Y(coordinate) AS latitude 
FROM 
    polluting_company 
WHERE 
    id = 2426
""")

company_location = pd.read_sql(query_company_location, engine)
company_longitude, company_latitude = company_location.iloc[0]['longitude'], company_location.iloc[0]['latitude']

# 重新获取公司2426周围10公里内的空气质量站点数量
query_stations_within_10km = text(f"""
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) 
FROM 
    air_quality_station 
WHERE 
    ST_DWithin(coordinate, ST_GeomFromText('POINT({company_longitude} {company_latitude})', 4326), 10000)
""")

stations_within_10km = pd.read_sql(query_stations_within_10km, engine)
stations_within_10km = stations_within_10km.iloc[0][0]

# 将结果赋值给变量
total_flue_gas = emission_data.iloc[0]['total_exhaust_gas']
peak_flue_gas = emission_data.iloc[0]['peak_exhaust_gas']
total_nox = emission_data.iloc[0]['total_nox']
stations_within_10km = stations_within_10km

# 修正公司坐标获取方式，使用ST_AsText函数获取坐标
query_company_location = text("""
SELECT 
    ST_AsText(coordinate) AS coordinate 
FROM 
    polluting_company 
WHERE 
    id = 2426
""")

company_location = pd.read_sql(query_company_location, engine)
company_coordinates = company_location.iloc[0]['coordinate']
company_longitude, company_latitude = map(float, company_coordinates[6:-1].split())

# 重新获取公司2426周围10公里内的空气质量站点数量
query_stations_within_10km = text(f"""
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) 
FROM 
    air_quality_station 
WHERE 
    ST_DWithin(coordinate, ST_GeomFromText('POINT({company_longitude} {company_latitude})', 4326), 10000)
""")

stations_within_10km = pd.read_sql(query_stations_within_10km, engine)
stations_within_10km = stations_within_10km.iloc[0][0]

# 将结果赋值给变量
total_flue_gas = emission_data.iloc[0]['total_exhaust_gas']
peak_flue_gas = emission_data.iloc[0]['peak_exhaust_gas']
total_nox = emission_data.iloc[0]['total_nox']
stations_within_10km = stations_within_10km

# 修正公司坐标获取方式，使用ST_AsText函数获取坐标
query_company_location = text("""
SELECT 
    ST_AsText(coordinate) AS coordinate 
FROM 
    polluting_company 
WHERE 
    id = 2426
""")

company_location = pd.read_sql(query_company_location, engine)
company_coordinates = company_location.iloc[0]['coordinate']
company_longitude, company_latitude = map(float, company_coordinates[6:-1].split())

# 重新获取公司2426周围10公里内的空气质量站点数量
query_stations_within_10km = text(f"""
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) 
FROM 
    air_quality_station 
WHERE 
    ST_DWithin(coordinate, ST_GeomFromText('POINT({company_longitude} {company_latitude})', 4326), 10000)
""")

stations_within_10km = pd.read_sql(query_stations_within_10km, engine)
stations_within_10km = stations_within_10km.iloc[0, 0]

# 将结果赋值给变量
total_flue_gas = emission_data.iloc[0]['total_exhaust_gas']
peak_flue_gas = emission_data.iloc[0]['peak_exhaust_gas']
total_nox = emission_data.iloc[0]['total_nox']
stations_within_10km = stations_within_10km
